title: An appliance with a retractable and slidable door
abstract: Apparatus relating to an appliance having a housing (110) with an aperture (115) providing access to an interior compartment (116) of the appliance and a door (120) are disclosed herein. In various embodiments, the door (120) may be designed to slide and retract within the housing (110) when actuating between at least a closed position and an open position. Additionally, the door (120) may be designed in various styles, wherein the particular style of door (120) chosen may be dependent upon the particular appliance.
